use_cases: Display subscription pricing tiers with interactive hover animations for SaaS products
Showcase premium or Pro membership tiers with a squishy scale effect
Create attention-grabbing pricing cards that respond to user hover for higher conversion
Feature tiered pricing with a glass-morphism aesthetic for modern web applications
Serve as a single pricing option card with call-to-action button for landing pages
ai_summary: A pricing card component featuring a squishy hover animation effect that scales elements smoothly using framer-motion. The card displays a Pro subscription tier at $299/month with a glass-morphism aesthetic using backdrop-blur effects, indigo gradient background, and animated background SVG elements. Includes a 'Get it now' CTA button with hover state transitions. Perfect for SaaS pricing sections, fintech subscription displays, or premium tier showcases with modern, interactive UI.
